'''hakate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:generalizably|generalizably]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-k-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:generalizably|generalizably]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| hakate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:hakate|hakate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:hakatesher|hakatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hakatesherĂ«m|hakatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hakatero|hakatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:hakateshĂ«|hakateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hakateshĂ«m|hakateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihakatero|gokihakatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokihakateshĂ«|gokihakateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihakateshĂ«m|gokihakateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gohakankerom|gohakankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohakankeshĂ«|gohakankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohakankeshĂ«m|gohakankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gohakankeya|gohakankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hakaterom|hakaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hakatemu|hakatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:hakateya|hakateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihakaterom|gokihakaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihakatemu|gokihakatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokihakateya|gokihakateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:hakakate|hakakate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:hakakatesher|hakakatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hakakatesherĂ«m|hakakatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hakakatero|hakakatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:hakakateshĂ«|hakakateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hakakateshĂ«m|hakakateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihakakatero|gokihakakatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokihakakateshĂ«|gokihakakateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihakakateshĂ«m|gokihakakateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gohakakankerom|gohakakankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohakakankeshĂ«|gohakakankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohakakankeshĂ«m|gohakakankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gohakakankeya|gohakakankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hakakaterom|hakakaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hakakatemu|hakakatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:hakakateya|hakakateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihakakaterom|gokihakakaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihakakatemu|gokihakakatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokihakakateya|gokihakakateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:hĂŠkĂŠte|hĂŠkĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:hĂŠkĂŠtesher|hĂŠkĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hĂŠkĂŠtesherĂ«m|hĂŠkĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hĂŠkĂŠtero|hĂŠkĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:hĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«|hĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«m|hĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihĂŠkĂŠtero|gokihĂŠkĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokihĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«|gokihĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«m|gokihĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gohĂŠkĂŠnkerom|gohĂŠkĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohĂŠkĂŠnkeshĂ«|gohĂŠkĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohĂŠkĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gohĂŠkĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gohĂŠkĂŠnkeya|gohĂŠkĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hĂŠkĂŠterom|hĂŠkĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hĂŠkĂŠtemu|hĂŠkĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:hĂŠkĂŠteya|hĂŠkĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihĂŠkĂŠterom|gokihĂŠkĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihĂŠkĂŠtemu|gokihĂŠkĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokihĂŠkĂŠteya|gokihĂŠkĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:hafkafte|hafkafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:hafkaftesher|hafkaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hafkaftesherĂ«m|hafkaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hafkaftero|hafkaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:hafkafteshĂ«|hafkafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hafkafteshĂ«m|hafkafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihafkaftero|gokihafkaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokihafkafteshĂ«|gokihafkafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihafkafteshĂ«m|gokihafkafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gohafkafnkerom|gohafkafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohafkafnkeshĂ«|gohafkafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohafkafnkeshĂ«m|gohafkafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gohafkafnkeya|gohafkafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hafkafterom|hafkafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hafkaftemu|hafkaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:hafkafteya|hafkafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihafkafterom|gokihafkafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihafkaftemu|gokihafkaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokihafkafteya|gokihafkafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
